name: Rodrik Greyjoy
disambiguator: half-brother of Toron; raised up by Harlaw/Blacktyde; gelded at Casterly Rock

name: Lord Dustin
disambiguator: lord of Barrowton who closed his gates against starving villagers

name: Nettles
disambiguator: "a ragged woman"; rider of Sheepstealer; the mountain "fire witch" of legend

name: Septon Bernard
disambiguator: anointed the infant Aegon with the seven oils in the royal sept

name: Lord Drumm
disambiguator: Lord of Old Wyk; slain in the Lannister reprisal

name: Lord Goodbrother
disambiguator: Lord of Great Wyk; slain in the Lannister reprisal

name: Pantera
disambiguator: six-breasted cat goddess of Lys, worshipped by Larra

name: Yndros of the Twilight
disambiguator: Lysene god, "male by day and female by night"

name: Bakkalon
disambiguator: "the pale child Bakkalon of the Sword", a Lysene god

name: Saagael
disambiguator: "faceless Saagael, the giver of pain"; thirst for blood

name: Faceless Men
disambiguator: assassins of Braavos, blamed for the Rogare brothers' deaths

name: Iron Bank of Braavos
disambiguator: lender to Cregan Stark; suspected of the Rogare intrigues

name: Rogare Bank
disambiguator: Lysene bank of House Rogare; branch atop Visenya's Hill; collapsed

name: Unsullied
disambiguator: eunuch warriors bought by Lysaro from the slavers of Astapor

name: Kingsguard
disambiguator: the white knights; Marston Waters its Lord Commander

name: Archon of Tyrosh
disambiguator: ruler of Tyrosh; gained in the Daughters' War settlement; a suspect in the Rogare deaths

name: Lannister reprisal on the Iron Islands
Birth of Prince Aegon (son of Viserys)
Last sighting of Sheepstealer and Nettles
Deaths of Lysandro and Drazenko Rogare
